title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. lonchodiforme
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. lonchodiforme is a subspecies of plant that belongs to the dandelion family, characterized by its hairy leaves and yellow flowers. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. lonchodiforme include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems.
